title: Acting Workshop
subtitle: From Beginner to Advanced Expression
instructorBio: One of the few Chinese stage actors and theatre/film creators based in Chicago.
instructorBioCn: 芝加哥少见的中国籍话剧演员、戏剧与影视创作者。
description: Two acting workshops designed for complete beginners and participants with prior experience. Starting from what acting is and what it performs, the classes guide participants through foundational theatrical concepts, acting terminology, ensemble exercises, and short-scene practice.
descriptionCn: 两门表演课程，分别面向零基础参与者与有一定经验的学员。课程将从表演的本质出发，带领参与者进入戏剧基础概念、表演术语、团队配合练习，并延伸到人物关系、对白处理与角色理解等更深入的表演训练。
topics: What is acting and what does it perform

title: Stage Design Masterclass
subtitle: Collaboration and Trade-offs in Scenic Design
subtitleCn: 舞台设计中的合作与取舍
instructorBio: Chicago-based scenic designer and Associate Professor at Northeastern Illinois University. Joonhee has designed sets for Raven Theatre and numerous Chicago productions.
instructorBioCn: 芝加哥舞美设计师、Northeastern Illinois University副教授。
description: Drawing on her work for Raven Theatre's Top Girls, Joonhee Park shares the full process of scenic design from concept to realization — discussing collaboration in creation, the importance of subtraction in design, and how to find the right balance in artistic expression.
descriptionCn: 她将结合Raven Theatre的作品《Top Girls》分享舞美设计从概念到落地的全过程，讨论创作中的合作、设计中的减法、以及如何在艺术表达中找到刚刚好的状态。
topics: Scenic design from concept to realization
The art of subtraction in design
Case study: Top Girls at Raven Theatre

title: Directing Masterclass
subtitle: If You Could Teach Only One Directing Class
subtitleCn: 如果只能教一节导演课
instructorBio: Chicago-based theatre director with extensive experience working across professional and academic productions.
instructorBioCn: 芝加哥戏剧导演，在专业与学术制作领域拥有丰富经验。
description: From the moment a director first receives a script, how do they understand the text, develop an overall concept, collaborate with actors and creative departments, and ultimately bring the work to the stage?
descriptionCn: 从第一次拿到剧本开始，导演如何理解文本、建立整体构想、与演员和各创作部门合作、最终将作品带到舞台现场。
topics: Collaborating with actors and creative departments
From page to stage: the full process

title: Improvisation Workshop
subtitle: Opening the Body and Perception to Expression
subtitleCn: 打开身体与感知的表达
instructorBio: Licensed music therapist, improviser, and interdisciplinary creator. Zilu works at the intersection of performance, therapy, and cross-cultural communication.
instructorBioCn: 美国注册音乐治疗师、即兴演员与跨领域创作者。
description: Combining improvisation, full-body listening, and deep listening, this workshop helps participants develop safer, more authentic, and more creative modes of expression in bilingual and cross-cultural contexts.
descriptionCn: 课程将结合即兴表演、全身倾听与深度聆听的方法，帮助参与者在双语与跨文化语境中建立更安全、更真实、更有创造力的表达方式。
topics: Expression in bilingual and cross-cultural contexts
Building ensemble trust and creative safety

title: A Young Asian Actor's Journey
subtitle: Industry Talk with Thomas Tran
instructorBio: An emerging Asian actor active in Chicago theatres including Goodman Theatre.
instructorBioCn: 活跃于Goodman Theatre等芝加哥剧场的青年亚裔演员。
description: Thomas Tran shares his experiences with school applications, auditions, and performance — giving audiences a closer look at how a young actor enters the professional theatre system in the United States.
descriptionCn: 作为活跃于Goodman Theatre等芝加哥剧场的青年亚裔演员，Thomas Tran将分享自己的考学、试镜与表演经历，带大家了解一位年轻演员如何一步步进入专业剧场体系。
topics: The audition process in professional theatre
Life as a working actor in Chicago
Experiences as an Asian actor in American theatre

title: Playwriting Talk
subtitle: From the Page to the Stage with John Muggleton
instructorBio: Canadian playwright, director, and actor. John's play An Act of Grace is receiving its world Chinese-language premiere at CCTF 2026.
instructorBioCn: 来自加拿大的编剧、导演与演员。其作品《An Act of Grace》正在CCTF进行全球中文版首演。
description: The Canadian playwright, director, and actor will speak about how a script is born, how a writer develops a personal style, and how long it takes for a play to move from page to stage.
descriptionCn: 这位来自加拿大的编剧、导演与演员，将围绕剧本如何诞生、如何发展写作风格、一部戏从页面走向舞台需要多久等主题展开分享。
topics: The journey from page to stage
